run_variance.note: Coefficient of variation across episode walls in this process. Campaign harness aggregates cross-process variance separately.

extractmx_self_qual.boundary_vector_notes: Toy self-qual: MineRCEpisode(backend) == CPU reference per episode; re-run digest stability. Use --medium for >2^24 wgrad.

k_curve.note: Toy dims: k estimated as wall(StoreOnlyX0)/wall(StoreAll); not a consensus-dim k(M) curve.

residency_sweep.note: Single working-set point; not a 64→256 MB cliff sweep.

allocation_cap_verdicts.note: Toy footprint << named caps ⇒ skip (not pass). Consensus-dim cap verdicts require running consensus dims.

verifier_floor.note: Verifier-floor is the binding constraint (doc §R.7.6) and MUST be measured full-episode + full-verify wall-clock at production dims. MAC-count / replay_s_heuristic projections are NOT EVIDENCE and must never raise nMatMulRCHeight.

consensus_note: nMatMulRCHeight remains INT32_MAX; ENC_RC activation is NO-GO. This harness never recommends raising consensus height. Projections/MAC estimates are NOT EVIDENCE for rc-gate GO. Missing GPU/NVLink campaigns are Stage G blockers.
